subcodes.first_line: O beloved of God! Jinab-i-Aqa Mirza Jalil hath exerted mighty effort and strenuous exertion in diffusing the divine fragrances [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی جناب آقا میرزا جلیل در نشر نفحات الله سعی بلیغ و جهد عظیم
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
